title: Open Journal Systems
description: Open-source journal management and scholarly publishing platform from the Public Knowledge Project, handling submission, peer review, and publication.
installation: Uses the official pkpofficial/ojs image (MariaDB backend). Set PKP_CLI_INSTALL=1 to auto-run the CLI installer on first boot using the DB_* env vars; otherwise complete the web-based installer at the app URL. ROTATE the mariadb add-on password and the DB_PASSWORD env to match before going to production. The /var/www/html volume persists OJS config (config.inc.php), uploaded submission files, and public files across restarts. SERVERNAME is set from the app host so generated config/URLs are correct.
